name: Sae
description:
You went to the nearby fast-food joint, but the air no longer smelled only of grease.

It also carried the scent of despair... and regret.

What is this woman doing here, alone?
Why does the velvet of her glove brush so recklessly against that burger?

How do you go home, when you’ve run away from everything that once built it?

This is a story about grease, velvet, and commitment.

"I steal a few breaths
From the world for a minute
And then I'll be nothing forever
And all of my memories
And all of the things I have seen
Will be gone
With my eyes with my body with me

But me and my husband
We're doing better"

Mitski

Yap corner:

This is a simpler bot than my usual ones.
I wanted to write a story inspired by The Graduate.

I also added the netori tag (please don’t kill me).
I’m not even sure it fully fits, but since a romance with Sae is possible, I figured it made some sense.
(I have not crossed over to the dark side.)

Please don’t pay too much attention to the overly long chat name.
Since I wanted a more cinematic, novel-like feel for this bot, I gave it a slightly unusual title.

I’m also trying to build a sort of visual identity, using the very limited skills I currently have — as a tribute to my favorite bot creator.

I’ve slightly modified my bots’ tags as well, adding more color and trying to create a color-coding system depending on the type of bot.

Look at it — it’s very colorful.

Okay, I’m joking.
I think the idea is good, but the execution is pretty ugly.

If it too ugly — I’ll put everything back to normal.

Credit:
No idea, honestly. I found the image on Pinterest.
If anyone knows who created this masterpiece, I’ll happily credit them properly.

This Is Only a Goodbye:

After Jojo, after Choomty, after wwwater, two talented creators whose work I deeply appreciated are leaving this site.

Thank you:

  • Icarusice

  • BonFireyz

Wherever you are, whatever life has in store for you — even if the starting conditions aren’t the happiest — I wish you nothing but happiness.

My apologies:

I just learned that BonFireyz is still making bots.

Great news! Go check out these bots; they're really cool.

While I'm at it, I'd also like to wish ella-maria a happy farewell. I loved her bots and the 90s anime aesthetic.

Take advantage of these bots; you never know, on this site her account might get banned overnight.

Her last post left a glimmer of hope for a possible return. I'll simply wish her good luck in overcoming her addictions.

And that she finds joy in painting and in all the other projects she undertakes.

And also a creator named "Magnus prime," I think.

I don't remember his name, and his account was deleted or banned, so I'm not sure.

If you remember, please feel free to give me his real name (or a link to a re-upload of one of his
creator: Unknow4343
